description_long: This is a modern detached house with a dark gable roof and a clean, geometric design. The front features a double garage with two large doors, a covered entryway, and a paved driveway. The exterior walls are finished in a light color, contrasting with the dark roof and window frames. Large windows are present on the front and sides, allowing ample natural light inside. The house sits on a rectangular plot with a grass lawn surrounding the paved areas. A covered patio or carport is visible on one side, providing additional sheltered outdoor space.
description: A modern, light-colored house with a dark gable roof, double garage, large windows, and a mix of paved and grassy exterior areas.
description_view_0: Front view showing the double garage doors, main entryway, and paved driveway with a partial view of the side patio.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting two rectangular windows, the extended roof overhang, and the paved path along the side.
description_view_2: Rear angled view showing the covered patio area, back windows, and the grassy backyard.
description_view_3: Back view displaying the full width of the house, rear overhang, and the paved area extending behind the house.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large front and side windows
attribute_entryway_design: Covered entryway with a small porch, double garage doors, and a paved approach
